channel.title: maintain on Kang's blog
channel.description: Recent content in maintain on Kang's blog

item.title: Python Maintenance
item.description: The best way to maintain python packages is try your best to use your system package manager, not using pip or conda. If the package can be found in your system’s official repository, install from it. For example, if your linux distribution is Manjaro or Arch, download numpy by pacman: 1 sudo pacman -S python-numpy The system package manager can automatically check the dependency and update your packages if Python
